race.comment: CHEVAL SAVANT (10) ran below expectations last time after being in contention on the turn at Albany, finishing fifth and beaten 4.5 lengths starting at $5. Looks suited to the style of racing we see up at Broome and while this trip is short of his best, he's sure to be strong late. LOVA SESSION (5) turned in an eye-catching run over 1300m at this track last time, ridden back before coming home with a powerful run to finish third. Expected to prove tough to hold out again. WOLFMAN (11) broke through for his maiden win over 1200m at this track last time. Breaks from a wide alley but he cannot be underestimated. SUPER ROMANI (2) is returning from a spell of three months. Finished tenth at Ascot over 1400m at the first run last prep. Now with a new trainer Leigh Murray. KINGS CALL (3) can go on with the job after a dominant win here first-up.
